zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Atherton於1410年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾李時，她的父親Sir William Atherton III28歲，母親Elizabeth Pilkington22歲。她於1442年與John Ireland II在英國藍卡爾瓦頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1454年在英國英格蘭爾瓦維頓享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾切斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Atherton于1410年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾李时，她的父亲Sir William Atherton III28岁，母亲Elizabeth Pilkington22岁。她于1442年与John Ireland II在英国藍卡爾瓦頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1454年在英国英格兰爾瓦維頓享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾切斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Atherton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place near Manchester named Atherton, from the Old English personal name Æthelhere + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.
English: habitational name from Hatherton, Staffordshire, from Old English haguthorn + dūn ‘the hill where hawthorn grows’.

English (East Anglia): topographic name from Middle English at ther doune ‘(dweller) on the hill’ (Old English æt thǣre dūne). Through confusion of -don and -ton, Attherdoune was altered to Atherton, Adderton, and Atterton.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Atherton was born in 1410, in Leigh, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Atherton III, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth Pilkington, was 22. She married John Ireland II in 1442, in Warton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1454, in Waverton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Atherton est née en 1410, à Leigh, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Atherton III, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Pilkington, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Ireland II en 1442, à Warton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1454, à Waverton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Atherton 1410 in Leigh, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Atherton III 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Pilkington 22. Sie hat 1442 in Warton, Lancashire, England John Ireland II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1454 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Waverton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Athertonが1410年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアレイグで生まれた時，父Sir William Atherton IIIは28歳，母Elizabeth Pilkingtonは22歳であった。1442年にイギリスランカシュアイアワートンでJohn Ireland IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1454年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワバートンで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Atherton(이)가 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Atherton III(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Pilkington(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1442년 영국 랭카실르 워턴에서 John Ireland II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1454년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 와버턴에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John Ireland II em 1442, em Warton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Atherton родилась в 1410 г. в местности лиг, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Atherton III было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Pilkington, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Ireland II в 1442 г. в местности вартон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1454 г. в местности вавиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
